column16:
I am an instrumentalist, and melodies are constantly floating in my mind. However, I struggle to capture them and turn them into complete pieces of music. I also write lyrics, and I often start a composition, whether it begins with a melody or words but I rarely finish it as a final product.

I don’t have any formal training in music; I simply enjoy creating it. But now, I want to learn how to make good music using the limited knowledge I have and develop my ideas into finished compositions.
